message:
refactor(tests): derive surface contract counts from runtime data instead of hardcoded values

Replace hardcoded keep_count=10 in dependency_eradication,
manifest_dep_eradication, and proptest tests with
standard_surface_keep_count() derived from SURFACE_CONTRACT_V1. This
prevents tests from breaking when the surface contract table changes.
Update beads issue tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
